purpose: Frozen baselines for the SPEC's locked acceptance criteria. Each entry is the literal value the SPEC §3.1 commits to — refreshed only on deliberate SPEC amendment, not by corpus drift. See SPEC §3.1 (a) for the headline regression case rationale.

meshOff.purpose: SPEC §3.1 (a) — `expanded` mode must return ≥ this value. Frozen at this number, NOT 'whatever mesh=off returns at flip time.'

default.purpose: The regression case itself — today's default returns zero. Spec resolves this by replacing concept_fallback with concept_expanded.
